description: Apply group assignments to rblock facets based on contact or geometric criteria.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('rblock apply facet groups ...') via command interface

keywords.name: match
keywords.description: Specify number of facets matching for group assignment. By default i = 1 and the group is assigned to the contact if either facet is in the group. If i = 2, both facets must be in the group for the group to be assigned to the contact.

keywords.name: tolerance
keywords.description: Specify the tolerance for contact identification. Contacts with normal within f degrees of the facet normal are selected. By default the tolerance is 0 degrees.
